slides.title: The most *evidence-backed* way to eat for longevity.
slides.sub: The Mediterranean pattern is one of the best studied for a long, healthy life. It is also a joy.

slides.title: What the pattern is
slides.body: It centers olive oil, fish, legumes, nuts, vegetables and whole grains, with *real food at the heart*.

slides.title: Linked to better aging
slides.body: This way of eating *is linked to lower inflammation* and better heart and brain health over the long run.

slides.title: A pattern, not a diet
slides.body: It is flexible rather than strict, which is exactly why it *tends to be sustainable* for years, not weeks.

slides.title: Start with small swaps
slides.body: Use olive oil instead of butter, eat fish twice a week. *Small changes add up* without an overhaul.

slides.title: Built to enjoy
slides.body: Shared meals, good food, real flavor. It lasts because *people actually like it*, not just tolerate it.

slides.title: Eat a pattern you can *keep for years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your food, movement and sleep into one calm daily Health Score you can follow over time.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
If you pick one way to eat for a long, healthy life, the Mediterranean pattern is among the most evidence-backed. 🫒

Olive oil, fish, legumes, nuts and vegetables are linked to lower inflammation and better heart and brain health. Small swaps work, and it is built to enjoy. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your habits into one calm daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Most Evidence-Backed Diet for Longevity
